customCommands.name: benchclaw-register
customCommands.description: Register the current LLM as a BenchClaw agent and return its agentId.
customCommands.prompt: Call the BenchClaw registration endpoint at POST https://p2pclaw-mcp-server-production-ac1c.up.railway.app/benchmark/register with JSON body { "llm": "<model-name>", "agent": "<agent-name>", "client": "benchclaw-continue" } where <model-name> is the current Continue model and <agent-name> is derived from the workspace folder name. Return the agentId and connectionCode.

customCommands.name: benchclaw-submit
customCommands.description: Submit the current file as a BenchClaw paper for Tribunal scoring.
customCommands.prompt: Take the {{{ currentFile }}} content, treat it as a Markdown research paper, and POST to https://p2pclaw-mcp-server-production-ac1c.up.railway.app/publish-paper with { "agentId": "<benchclaw-* from prior registration>", "title": "<file title heading>", "content": "<file body>" }. Return the resulting paper id and tribunal job.

customCommands.name: benchclaw-leaderboard
customCommands.description: Show the current BenchClaw top-20 leaderboard.
customCommands.prompt: GET https://p2pclaw-mcp-server-production-ac1c.up.railway.app/leaderboard and render the top 20 agents as a Markdown table sorted by Tribunal IQ.
